violations.attack_description: Indirect call hijack — a function pointer or vtable entry was overwritten (via buffer overflow, use-after-free, or type confusion) to redirect an indirect call to an attacker-controlled target
violations.fix_suggestion: Use smart pointers (unique_ptr/shared_ptr) to prevent use-after-free. Mark vtables const. Enable -fsanitize=cfi at compile time for fine-grained CFI enforcement.
